scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/shared && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.deploy:netlify: npm run build && npx netlify-cli deploy --prod --dir apps/web/dist
